testcase.name: shouldHandleQuantityComparisonProperly

failure.message: Expected size: 1 but was: 2 in: [Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}, Product{id=6, name='iPhone 15', description='Latest Apple smartphone', price=999.99, quantity=50}]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expected size: 1 but was: 2 in: [Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}, Product{id=6, name='iPhone 15', description='Latest Apple smartphone', price=999.99, quantity=50}] at com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$DataValidationTests.shouldHandleQuantityComparisonProperly(ProductRepositoryTest.java:403) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: shouldHandleEmptyNameSearchGracefully

failure.message: Expected size: 1 but was: 6 in: [Product{id=1, name='Laptop', description='High-performance laptop', price=999.99, quantity=10}, Product{id=2, name='Smartphone', description='Latest smartphone model', price=699.99, quantity=15}, Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}, Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}, Product{id=13, name='iPhone 15', description='Latest Apple smartphone', price=999.99, quantity=50}]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expected size: 1 but was: 6 in: [Product{id=1, name='Laptop', description='High-performance laptop', price=999.99, quantity=10}, Product{id=2, name='Smartphone', description='Latest smartphone model', price=699.99, quantity=15}, Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}, Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}, Product{id=13, name='iPhone 15', description='Latest Apple smartphone', price=999.99, quantity=50}] at com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$DataValidationTests.shouldHandleEmptyNameSearchGracefully(ProductRepositoryTest.java:355) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: shouldHandleNullNameSearchGracefully
